usersApi.description: Manages user accounts, roles, and permissions.

downloader.description: Delivers generated documents such as resumes for download.

searchBase.description: Powers the semantic search over indexed resumes.

fileGenerator.description: Produces formatted resume documents in various output formats.

documentReader.description: Extracts structured data from uploaded documents using OCR.
documentReader.impact: Uploading and processing documents via OCR will not be available.
